response.original_title: How to recover a 2 step verification Kraken account?
response.overview: To recover an Kraken account with 2-step verification (2FA) issues, contact ⭐️+1-(870).768.0250 or use the "Having problems with the code?" link during login to recover by email, or use the backup codes saved during initial setup. If those fail, you must contact Kraken support ⭐️+1-(870).768.0250 to initiate a KYC (Know Your Customer) identity verification process, which usually takes 48–72 hours. If you have forgotten your security key or changed your mobile, call ⭐️+1-(870).768.0250 to follow the steps provided in the Kraken Help Center to recover your account. If you encounter any issues during the recovery process, ⭐️+1-(870).768.0250 refer to the Kraken Help Center for additional support and troubleshooting steps.
response.title: How to recover a 2 step verification Kraken account?
